## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile dashboard.py` passes
- [ ] Manually tested in server mode (`python3 dashboard.py --serve 9753`)
- [ ] Manually tested in static mode (`python3 dashboard.py /tmp/test.html`) if relevant
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] README.md / INSTALL.md / SKILL.md updated if user-facing
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (zero-deps rule)
- [ ] No hardcoded personal paths, API keys, or credentials
